ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day the data was collected */,
  "pollution_level" TEXT /* Pollution level (e.g., Moderate, Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups) */,
  "pollution_level_index" REAL /* Pollution level index (e.g., US AQI, PM2.5) */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions (e.g., None, 40%) */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Weather description (e.g., Partly Cloudy with a high of 75°F) */,
  "temperature_high" REAL /* High temperature for the day */,
  "temperature_low" REAL /* Low temperature for the day */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (e.g., 4.5 mp/h) */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "air_quality_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the air_quality_data table */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each data point
Pollution level (e.g., Moderate, Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups)
Pollution level index (e.g., US AQI, PM2.5)
Weather description (e.g., Partly Cloudy with a high of 75°F)
Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W)
Foreign key referencing the locations table
Foreign key referencing the categories table
Timestamp when the data was collected
Timestamp when the data was last updated
Foreign key referencing the air_quality_data table
Level of the alert (e.g., High, Medium, Low)
Timestamp when the alert was triggered
